# Auto-generated 1.18.2 decision category compatibility for effix.
# Adds categories referenced by copied/stale decision files.

# From common\decisions\categories\AFG_decision_categories.txt

AFG_sikh_recruitment_cat = {
	icon = GFX_decision_category_army_reform

	priority = 5

	allowed = {
		original_tag = AFG
		has_dlc = "Graveyard of Empires"
	}

	visible = {
		has_completed_focus = AFG_ally_the_sikhs
	}
}

			has_government = fascism

		}
	}

}

BALTIC_entente = {
	
	icon = GFX_decision_category_eng_move_to_secure_the_dominions

	allowed = {
		OR = {
			original_tag = LIT
			original_tag = LAT
			original_tag = EST
		}
		has_dlc = "No Step Back"
	}

	visible = {
		OR = {
			has_completed_focus = EST_formalize_baltic_entente
			has_completed_focus = LAT_formalize_baltic_entente
			has_completed_focus = LIT_formalize_baltic_entente
		}
	}
}

	}
}

# From common\decisions\categories\CHL_decision_categories.txt

CHL_anti_colonialism_category = {
	
	icon = GFX_decision_category_saf_anti_colonialist_crusade
	
	allowed = {
		original_tag = CHL
	}

	priority = {
		base = 10
	}

	visible = {
		has_dlc = "Trial of Allegiance"
		OR = {
			has_completed_focus = CHL_sponsor_anti_colonialist_rebellions
			has_completed_focus = CHL_sponsor_american_revolutions
		}
	}

	on_map_area = {
		target_array = CHL.american_colonial_states_array
		name = ETH_anti_colonialism_map_category_name
		zoom = 150
	}
	visible_when_empty = yes 
}

	icon = GFX_decision_category_eng_move_to_secure_the_dominions

	allowed = {
		original_tag = EST
		has_dlc = "No Step Back"
	}

	visible = {
		has_completed_focus = EST_national_pride_in_finland
		NOT = {
			has_country_flag = EST_vapsid_takeover_finland

				original_tag = FIN 
				OR = {
					has_government = fascism
 					has_country_flag = estonia_started_cw_in_finland
				}
			}
		}
	}
	
	on_map_area = {
		state = 149
		name = EST_convert_FIN_cat
		zoom = 500
	}
	priority = 10
}

infiltrate_belarus_decisions = {
	
	icon = GFX_decision_category_eng_move_to_secure_the_dominions

	allowed = {
		OR = {
			original_tag = LIT
			original_tag = LAT
			original_tag = EST
			original_tag = SOV
		}
		has_dlc = "No Step Back"
	}

	visible = {
		OR = {
			AND = {
				tag = SOV
				any_other_country = {
					has_completed_focus = BALTIC_belarus_ssr
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = BALTIC_seek_support_of_soviets }
				}
			}
			AND = {
				has_completed_focus = BALTIC_belarus_ssr
				NOT = { has_completed_focus = BALTIC_seek_support_of_soviets }
			}
		}
		NOT = { has_global_flag = belarus_baltic_resolved }
	}
}

# From common\decisions\categories\POL_decision_categories.txt

POL_fight_against_monarchy_in_LIT_cat = {
	
	icon = GFX_decision_category_generic_propaganda

	allowed = {
	}

	visible = {
		OR = {
			AND = {
				original_tag = LIT
				POL = {
					has_completed_focus = POL_support_monarchism_in_LIT
					NOT = { has_country_flag = attempted_royal_takeover_in_LIT }
				}
				NOT = { has_country_flag = POL_banned_monarchy_flag }
				NOt = { has_completed_focus = LIT_a_king_for_our_people }
				exists = yes
				is_subject = no
			}
			AND = {
				original_tag = ROM
				POL = {
					has_completed_focus = POL_internal_romanian_support
					NOT = { has_country_flag = attempted_royal_takeover_in_ROM }
				}
				NOT = { has_country_flag = POL_banned_monarchy_flag }
				exists = yes
				is_subject = no
			}
			AND = {
				original_tag = CZE
				POL = {
					has_completed_focus = POL_support_monarchy_in_CZE
					NOT = { has_country_flag = attempted_royal_takeover_in_CZE }
				}
				NOT = { has_country_flag = POL_banned_monarchy_flag }
				exists = yes
				is_subject = no
			}
			AND = {
				original_tag = POL
				LIT = {
					has_completed_focus = LIT_support_monarchism_in_POL
					NOT = { has_country_flag = attempted_royal_takeover_in_POL }
				}
				NOT = { 
					has_country_flag = achievement_POL_elected_monarch
					has_country_flag = POL_banned_monarchy_flag 
				}
				exists = yes
				is_subject = no
			}
		}
	}

	priority = 10
}

SWE_coax_nordic_defense_council_cat = {
	allowed = {
		tag = SWE
		has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
	}
	priority = 50
	visible = {
		has_completed_focus = SWE_central_nordic_army_command
		exists = yes
		has_capitulated = no
		is_subject = no

		OR = {
			NOR = {
				exists = yes
				has_capitulated = no
				is_subject = no
				is_ai = yes
				has_country_flag = rejected_nordic_defense_council
			}

			FIN = {
				exists = yes
				has_capitulated = no
				is_subject = no
				is_ai = yes
				has_country_flag = rejected_nordic_defense_council
			}

			ICE = {
				exists = yes
				has_capitulated = no
				OR = {
					is_subject = no
					is_subject_of = DEN
				}
				is_ai = yes
			}

			DEN = {
				exists = yes
				has_capitulated = no
				is_subject = no
				is_ai = yes
				has_country_flag = rejected_nordic_defense_council
			}
		}
	}
}
# From common\decisions\categories\SWE_decision_categories.txt

SWE_communist_foreign_influence = {
	allowed = {
		tag = SWE
		has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
	}
	icon = GFX_decision_category_generic_communism
	visible = {
		OR = {
			has_completed_focus = SWE_support_norwegian_communists
			has_completed_focus = SWE_support_danish_communists
		}
	}
	priority = 10
}
# From common\decisions\categories\SWE_decision_categories.txt

SWE_ebba_palmstierna_cat = {
	allowed = {
		tag = SWE
		has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
	}
	visible = {
		SWE_ebba_palmstierna = { 
			has_character_flag = is_hired 
			NOT = {
				has_trait = SWE_ebba_add_production
				has_trait = SWE_ebba_political_clout
				has_trait = SWE_ebba_add_research
			}
		}

	}
}
# From common\decisions\categories\SWE_decision_categories.txt

SWE_military_matters ={
	allowed = {
		tag = SWE
		has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"	
	}
	priority = 80
	visible = {
		OR = {
			has_completed_focus = SWE_jagartrupper
			has_completed_focus = SWE_hemvarnet

		}

		exists = yes
		has_capitulated = no
		is_subject = no

	}
}
# From common\decisions\categories\SWE_decision_categories.txt

SWE_rationing_policies = {
	allowed = {
		tag = SWE
		has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
	}
	priority = 97
	visible = {
		has_capitulated = no
		exists = yes
		has_completed_focus = SWE_rationing
	}
}
# From common\decisions\categories\SWE_decision_categories.txt

SWE_royalist_buildup = {
	allowed = {
		tag = SWE
	}
	icon = GFX_decision_category_eng_appeal_to_imperial_loyalists
	priority = 80
	visible = {
		has_completed_focus = SWE_undermine_the_fascists
		has_capitulated = no
	}
	visible_when_empty = no
}
# From common\decisions\categories\SWE_decision_categories.txt

SWE_train_the_sheltered_cat = {
	allowed = {
		tag = SWE
		has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
	}
	priority = 100
	scripted_gui = swe_train_the_sheltered_scripted_ui
	visible_when_empty = yes
	visible = {
		has_completed_focus = SWE_train_the_sheltered
		has_capitulated = no
		exists = yes
		NOT = {
			has_country_flag = SWE_has_activated_train_the_sheltered
		}
	}
}
# From common\decisions\categories\CHI_decision_categories.txt

XIC_war_in_yanan = {
	icon = GFX_decision_category_NOR_fascist_deploy_prep
	allowed = {
		OR = {
			original_tag = XIC
			original_tag = PRC
		}
	}
	priority = 100
}
